Off Calendar Jan-23-2008 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Rose Johnson, property manager, appearing on behalf of plaintiff, Loren Miller Homes, Inc.
Charles Tillman Ramsey, Esq. for plaintiff Loren Miller Homes, Inc.

Anthony Label, Esq. by limited scope representation for defendant Turanesha Berry, who was also present; Sheila K. Robello, Esq. (counsel of record for probate matter only) for defendant Inez Gaspard, who was not present

Settlement conference held. The parties reached a settlement, which was fully recited on the record by Mr. Anthony Label and followed by a signed agreement filed in court. See scanned document for the settlement terms contained in the signed agreement for the premises located at 911 McAllister St., #87, San Francisco, CA.

The case settled. Trial date vacated.

Judge Pro Tem Irving Pfeffer, Clerk Linda Fong, Court Reporter Leticia Perez, CSR #7782
